title: Pulling out for the magic forest — Jeep cabin chatter
prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot inside @jeep-interior — view from the back-row footwell looking forward through the windshield. @Mama already in the driver seat (LEFT-FRONT), both hands on the steering wheel, glancing in the rearview mirror with a warm smile. @Sara already buckled in the rear right seat, leaning forward eagerly, hands gripping the seatbelt. @Eva already buckled in the rear left seat next to her sister, bouncing in her booster, knees tucked. Mama (glancing in the rearview mirror): "Okay! Magic Forest, here we come!" Sara (excited, eyes huge): "Will there be REAL magic creatures?" Eva (bouncing harder): "Hide-and-seek MAGIC creatures! That's the BEST kind!" Mama (laughing softly): "Eyes on the trees, ladies." The Jeep rolls forward and out of the driveway.
